chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SSTRA No. 203 of 2025 SSTRA No. 204 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge SSTRA No. 203 of 2025 Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No. 2330/2025 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For order on CMA No. 2331/2025 SSTRA No. 204 of 2025 Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No. 2332/2025 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For order on CMA No. 2333/2025 23.01.2026 Barrister Talha Abbasi for the Applicant Learned counsel under instructions does not press these Reference Applications. Dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Office to place copy of this order in the captioned reference applications. Office to place copy of this order in connected reference application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
